sourceSections.title: Core loop
sourceSections.text: The player explores one compact level, collects three gems, avoids a patrolling slime, and reaches the exit door.

sourceSections.title: Controls
sourceSections.text: Keyboard controls include left, right, jump, and interact.

sourceSections.title: Acceptance goals
sourceSections.text: A valid prototype proves gem collection, slime contact damage, and exit unlock after all gems are collected.

requirements.evidenceBoundary: source-linked requirement; not generated authority; review required before any prototype draft or apply.
